$comment: Repo-level MCP server configuration. Read by Claude Code, Cursor, and other MCP-aware clients. Mirrored to .vscode/mcp.json for VS Code Copilot, and to .cursor/mcp.json for Cursor.

codegraph.$comment: CodeGraph — symbol lookup, callers/callees, route mapping. Treat as discovery (not edit). Run any 'make codegraph.reindex' equivalent after large refactors. See .agents/skills/mcp-usage/SKILL.md.
